source.title: The Pre-Travel Consultation
source.jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance for international travel; requires destination-specific and UAE adaptation
source.population: International travelers, preserving itinerary, destination, duration, purpose, activity, age, pregnancy, immune status, chronic illness and special-risk qualifiers.
source.setting: Pre-travel consultation in travel-medicine or primary-care settings, with specialist input for complex travelers.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting traveler health background, itinerary, trip purpose, activities, prior travel, immunization and medicine context and individualized risk assessment; no vaccine, medicine, dose or advice is mapped.

exact_location.heading: Components of a pre-travel consultation
exact_location.locator: official chapter section “Components of a pre-travel consultation”

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting health background, itinerary, trip duration, purpose, planned activities, country-specific context, consultation limits and need for specialist input without generating advice.

items.rationale: Exact phrase located in inspected full source.
